mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, loan_id AS loanId, due_date AS dueDate, repay_amount AS repayAmount, status, paid_at AS paidAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM `bank`.`loan_schedule` WHERE loan_id = #{loanId} AND status IN ('OVERDUE', 'SCHEDULED') ORDER BY due_date ASC

SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, loan_id AS loanId, due_date AS dueDate, repay_amount AS repayAmount, status, paid_at AS paidAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM `bank`.`loan_schedule` WHERE loan_id = #{loanId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY due_date ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `bank`.`loan_schedule` (loan_id, due_date, repay_amount, status) VALUES
(#{schedule.loanId}, #{schedule.dueDate}, #{schedule.repayAmount}, 'SCHEDULED')
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, loan_id AS loanId, due_date AS dueDate, repay_amount AS repayAmount, status, paid_at AS paidAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM `bank`.`loan_schedule` WHERE loan_id = #{loanId} AND due_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY due_date ASC
SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, loan_id AS loanId, due_date AS dueDate, repay_amount AS repayAmount, status FROM `bank`.`loan_schedule` WHERE status = 'SCHEDULED' AND due_date < #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`loan_schedule` SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE loan_id = #{loanId} AND status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'OVERDUE')
UPDATE `bank`.`loan_schedule` SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE loan_id = #{loanId} AND status = 'SCHEDULED' AND due_date >= CURDATE()
